sections.heading: Use typography to present your design and content as clearly and efficiently as possible.
Typeface
content:
You must only use Roboto in the product. Roboto mono should be used for representations of code. 
Roobert is the brand typeface only for marketing and communication materials like website, PPTs, and flyers.

sections.heading: Language support
content: Provide Noto as a font when your product is being consumed by users who read languages with tall or dense scripts.

sections.heading: Minimum size
content: Must not use type sizes smaller than 11px. You may use 11px text in labels in tags and data visualizations and supporting text with icon.

sections.heading: Line length
content:
Text line length is 544px at max with 16px text
Text line length is 480px at max with 14px text
Text line length is 424px at max with 12px text

sections.heading: Paragraph spacing
content: At default, the paragraph spacing is 8px.

sections.heading: Accessibility
content:
Default body text size is 14px
Minimum body text size is 12px
11px is only acceptable for non-essential UI
Use defined type styles (Avoid light weight)
Maintain readable line height and spacing
Text line length is 544px at max with 16px text
Text line length is 480px at max with 14px text
Text line length is 424px at max with 12px text
Avoid placeholder-only labels
Avoid long blocks of dense text
